name: 旭川 (Asahikawa)
author: ahkimn
description:
Highly-detailed map focusing on the city of 旭川 (Asahikawa), the second largest city in 北海道 (Hokkaidō) and the focal point of the island's northern half.

Demand data is sourced from the 2020/2021 Japanese census data, and extends both north and east along the 石狩川 (Ishikari River) and its tributaries. The map includes special demand for primary/secondary/post-secondary education + airports + ports + hospitals + various cultural attractions"
data_source: 統計局・令和２年国勢調査・令和3年経済センサス
